title: Phased MFA rollout for finance users
description: Enabled Microsoft Authenticator push MFA for the finance department after a two-week pilot. Payroll service accounts were excluded and user communications were sent five business days before enforcement.
lessons_learned: Piloting with payroll approvers and validating service account exclusions avoided month-end processing impact.

title: MFA enforcement for all contractors
description: Changed contractor sign-in policy from optional MFA to required MFA. Several shared vendor accounts used by the facilities team could not complete registration and blocked badge provisioning for a shift change.
lessons_learned: Review vendor-operated shared accounts and create time-boxed exceptions before broad MFA enforcement.
trigger: Change 'MFA enforcement for all contractors' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: A required user, app, or account exception was absent from the policy.
process_failure: Required exception was not documented before rollout.
business_impact: Affected business users lost access until an exception or rollback was applied.
preventive_control: Review vendor-operated shared accounts and create time-boxed exceptions before broad MFA enforcement.

title: MFA registration campaign for executive assistants
description: Required MFA registration for executive assistants before enabling stronger authentication for delegated mailbox access. Helpdesk monitored registration completion and no sign-in failures were reported.
lessons_learned: A registration-only phase gave the helpdesk time to resolve device issues before enforcement.

title: MFA enforcement for emergency access accounts
description: Attempted to require MFA for all cloud-only accounts. The change accidentally included break-glass accounts and prevented emergency access validation during a simulated outage.
lessons_learned: Break-glass accounts must be explicitly excluded and tested after every authentication policy update.
trigger: Change 'MFA enforcement for emergency access accounts' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Emergency access account was affected by the enforcement policy.
business_impact: Emergency tenant recovery was temporarily unavailable.
preventive_control: Break-glass accounts must be explicitly excluded and tested after every authentication policy update.

title: Authenticator number matching rollout
description: Enabled number matching for Microsoft Authenticator across production tenants. Pilot users validated mobile app versions and support articles were published before enforcement.
lessons_learned: Checking authenticator app versions during pilot reduced avoidable service desk contacts.

title: Conditional Access policy for unmanaged devices
description: Blocked access to SharePoint and Exchange from unmanaged devices except for approved browser-only sessions. Sales users confirmed the web-only fallback before the policy moved from report-only to enforced.
lessons_learned: Report-only evaluation identified expected travel scenarios before enforcement.

title: Conditional Access block for high-risk sign-ins
description: Enabled a block policy for high-risk sign-ins. The policy scope included a privileged automation account used by the SOC enrichment workflow, which stopped incident enrichment in Microsoft Sentinel.
lessons_learned: Conditional Access changes need an explicit inventory of automation identities and workload identities.
trigger: Change 'Conditional Access block for high-risk sign-ins' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Automation identity failed authentication after the policy changed.
process_failure: Service account inventory was incomplete before enforcement.
business_impact: Automation stopped and delayed dependent business workflows.
preventive_control: Conditional Access changes need an explicit inventory of automation identities and workload identities.

title: Conditional Access require compliant device for admin portals
description: Required compliant devices for Azure portal and Entra admin center access. Administrators were pre-validated in Intune and temporary access passes were prepared for recovery.
lessons_learned: Validating administrator device compliance before enforcement avoided lockouts.

title: Conditional Access policy for Exchange ActiveSync
description: Created a Conditional Access policy to block mobile access unless devices were approved. The scope used All cloud apps instead of Exchange Online, which blocked Teams and SharePoint for field staff.
lessons_learned: Peer review must include cloud app scope and expected exclusions, not only user groups.
trigger: Change 'Conditional Access policy for Exchange ActiveSync' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: The enforcement policy matched more objects than intended.
process_failure: Policy scope included identities or systems that should have been excluded.
business_impact: Unexpected users or systems were blocked from normal work.
preventive_control: Peer review must include cloud app scope and expected exclusions, not only user groups.

title: Conditional Access sign-in frequency reduction
description: Reduced sign-in frequency for privileged roles from 24 hours to 8 hours. Change was communicated to administrators and no service disruption occurred.
lessons_learned: Admin-facing changes should include screenshots of the expected re-authentication prompt.

title: Block legacy authentication for Exchange Online
description: Disabled legacy authentication protocols for Exchange Online after monitoring sign-in logs for 30 days. One warehouse scanner application still used IMAP basic auth and stopped uploading delivery receipts.
lessons_learned: Legacy protocol sign-ins must be mapped to application owners, not only counted by user principal name.
trigger: Change 'Block legacy authentication for Exchange Online' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Legacy protocol or client could not satisfy the new authentication requirement.
process_failure: Legacy application dependency was not identified before the change.
business_impact: Legacy application users or jobs could not complete work.
preventive_control: Legacy protocol sign-ins must be mapped to application owners, not only counted by user principal name.

title: Tenant-wide POP authentication disablement
description: Disabled POP authentication for all mailboxes. No active POP clients were found in the previous 45 days and the change completed without user impact.
lessons_learned: A 45-day sign-in review window gave enough confidence for dormant protocol removal.

title: SMTP AUTH disablement for shared mailboxes
description: Disabled SMTP AUTH for shared mailboxes. A third-party invoice sender still used SMTP AUTH through a shared mailbox and outbound invoices queued until an exception was restored.
lessons_learned: Shared mailbox protocol usage must be correlated with vendor integrations before disabling SMTP AUTH.
trigger: Change 'SMTP AUTH disablement for shared mailboxes' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: An unmanaged dependency consumed the changed authentication path.
process_failure: Dependency discovery missed a consuming system.
business_impact: An undocumented business workflow was interrupted.
preventive_control: Shared mailbox protocol usage must be correlated with vendor integrations before disabling SMTP AUTH.

title: Disable basic auth for Autodiscover
description: Blocked basic authentication for Autodiscover after endpoint telemetry showed no supported clients using it. The helpdesk validated Outlook and mobile sign-in after the change.
lessons_learned: Post-change validation should include both Outlook desktop and native mobile clients.

title: Legacy authentication block for a acquired tenant
description: Applied the standard legacy auth block policy to a recently acquired tenant. Documentation missed a legal discovery mailbox using EWS basic auth, delaying evidence export jobs.
lessons_learned: Acquired tenant integrations require a separate dependency review before baseline policies are applied.
trigger: Change 'Legacy authentication block for a acquired tenant' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: The implementation used stale or incomplete configuration records.
process_failure: Runbook and ownership documentation were incomplete.
business_impact: Operators could not identify the correct owner or dependency quickly.
preventive_control: Acquired tenant integrations require a separate dependency review before baseline policies are applied.

title: Remove stale Global Administrator assignments
description: Removed permanent Global Administrator assignments from four inactive accounts after confirming no sign-in activity and no active ownership of production resources.
lessons_learned: Role removal is low risk when ownership and recent sign-in activity are reviewed together.

title: Remove Privileged Role Administrator from operations group
description: Removed Privileged Role Administrator from the operations group. The change included the only team able to approve PIM activations during overnight maintenance, blocking firewall emergency access.
lessons_learned: PIM approval chains must be reviewed before removing privileged administrative roles.
trigger: Change 'Remove Privileged Role Administrator from operations group' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Administrative sign-in was blocked by the new policy.
process_failure: Privileged access recovery was not tested before enforcement.
business_impact: Administrators could not perform recovery actions immediately.
preventive_control: PIM approval chains must be reviewed before removing privileged administrative roles.

title: Convert Exchange Administrator to eligible assignment
description: Converted permanent Exchange Administrator assignment to eligible PIM assignment for the messaging team. Activation was tested before the permanent role was removed.
lessons_learned: Testing PIM activation before removing permanent access prevents administrative gaps.

title: Remove Security Administrator from legacy SOC account
description: Removed Security Administrator from a legacy SOC account. The rollback plan referenced a retired access package, so restoring the permission took longer than expected.
lessons_learned: Rollback steps must be tested against current access packages, not copied from old change tickets.
trigger: Change 'Remove Security Administrator from legacy SOC account' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Rollback steps did not restore the previous service state.
process_failure: Rollback procedure was not validated end-to-end.
business_impact: Service disruption lasted longer because recovery was delayed.
preventive_control: Rollback steps must be tested against current access packages, not copied from old change tickets.

title: Remove dormant Azure subscription owner roles
description: Removed Owner role assignments from dormant guest accounts on non-production Azure subscriptions. Resource group owners confirmed no active dependency.
lessons_learned: Subscription owner cleanup should be approved by resource group owners and tenant security.

title: Restrict guest access to Teams shared channels
description: Restricted guest access to Teams shared channels for external domains not on the approved partner list. Partner managers validated the allow list before enforcement.
lessons_learned: Partner domain owners should sign off on guest access allow lists before enforcement.

title: Block guest invitations outside approved domains
description: Blocked guest invitations to unapproved domains. The policy accidentally excluded a newly acquired subsidiary domain, preventing onboarding of legal reviewers.
lessons_learned: Approved guest domains need a merger and acquisition exception review before tenant-wide enforcement.
trigger: Change 'Block guest invitations outside approved domains' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: A required user, app, or account exception was absent from the policy.
process_failure: Required exception was not documented before rollout.
business_impact: Affected business users lost access until an exception or rollback was applied.
preventive_control: Approved guest domains need a merger and acquisition exception review before tenant-wide enforcement.

title: Expire inactive guest accounts after 90 days
description: Enabled automatic review and removal for guest accounts inactive for more than 90 days. Application owners reviewed the removal report before accounts were disabled.
lessons_learned: Staged disabling before deletion gives application owners time to catch false positives.

title: Restrict external sharing in SharePoint
description: Reduced SharePoint external sharing from Anyone links to Existing guests only. A customer success workspace used anonymous links for a launch event and partner access failed during the briefing.
lessons_learned: External sharing changes must be communicated to customer-facing teams with upcoming launch events.
trigger: Change 'Restrict external sharing in SharePoint' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Users were blocked because operational readiness steps were missed.
process_failure: Affected users and service owners were not notified in time.
business_impact: Support volume increased and business users could not prepare.
preventive_control: External sharing changes must be communicated to customer-facing teams with upcoming launch events.

title: Guest access review for privileged groups
description: Started quarterly access reviews for guests in privileged collaboration groups. No access was removed until reviewers completed attestation.
lessons_learned: Access reviews are safer when removal happens only after explicit owner attestation.

title: Enable Defender for Endpoint attack surface reduction rule
description: Enabled the ASR rule blocking Office from creating child processes in audit mode, then enforced it for finance after validating macro-based reporting tools.
lessons_learned: Audit mode telemetry should be reviewed with application owners before ASR enforcement.

title: Defender Antivirus cloud protection enforcement
description: Changed Defender Antivirus cloud protection from default to high blocking level. A line-of-business installer was quarantined during warehouse device provisioning.
lessons_learned: Security policy testing must include device provisioning workflows, not only already-built endpoints.
trigger: Change 'Defender Antivirus cloud protection enforcement' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: The deployment path was not validated against realistic production usage.
process_failure: Pilot validation did not represent production dependencies.
business_impact: Production users experienced issues that should have been caught in pilot.
preventive_control: Security policy testing must include device provisioning workflows, not only already-built endpoints.

title: Defender web content filtering for uncategorized sites
description: Enabled web content filtering for uncategorized sites on corporate laptops. The policy was deployed first to IT and no business-critical sites were blocked.
lessons_learned: IT pilot groups should include users with representative SaaS usage before web filtering expansion.

title: Block USB removable storage with Defender device control
description: Enabled Defender device control to block write access to removable storage. The pilot missed a kiosk workflow that exported signed shipping labels to encrypted USB media.
lessons_learned: Device control pilots must include kiosks, shared workstations, and offline operational workflows.
trigger: Change 'Block USB removable storage with Defender device control' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: An unmanaged dependency consumed the changed authentication path.
process_failure: Dependency discovery missed a consuming system.
business_impact: An undocumented business workflow was interrupted.
preventive_control: Device control pilots must include kiosks, shared workstations, and offline operational workflows.

title: Defender tamper protection tenant rollout
description: Enabled Defender tamper protection for all managed Windows endpoints. Endpoint health telemetry stayed normal and helpdesk tickets did not increase.
lessons_learned: Endpoint health baselines make it easier to separate policy impact from normal device noise.

title: Require device compliance for Exchange mobile access
description: Required Intune device compliance for Exchange Online mobile access. Users with enrolled devices were unaffected and unmanaged devices received a clear remediation page.
lessons_learned: Clear remediation messages reduce helpdesk load during compliance enforcement.

title: Enforce BitLocker compliance for Windows devices
description: Marked devices non-compliant if BitLocker was not enabled. Several lab machines had TPM firmware issues and lost access to internal developer resources.
lessons_learned: Compliance policies should be tested on lab and engineering hardware, not only standard corporate images.
trigger: Change 'Enforce BitLocker compliance for Windows devices' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: The deployment path was not validated against realistic production usage.
process_failure: Pilot validation did not represent production dependencies.
business_impact: Production users experienced issues that should have been caught in pilot.
preventive_control: Compliance policies should be tested on lab and engineering hardware, not only standard corporate images.

title: Require minimum OS version for iOS devices
description: Updated Intune compliance policy to require a supported iOS version. Communications were sent two weeks in advance and non-compliant devices received self-service remediation steps.
lessons_learned: Mobile OS compliance changes need a clear grace period and user-visible remediation instructions.

title: Device compliance enforcement for virtual desktops
description: Applied device compliance enforcement to all Windows platforms. Non-persistent virtual desktops could not report compliance quickly enough and users lost access to Teams meetings.
lessons_learned: Non-persistent VDI needs separate compliance timing and grace-period validation.
trigger: Change 'Device compliance enforcement for virtual desktops' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: The change landed during active business processing.
process_failure: Implementation timing conflicted with a business-critical window.
business_impact: A business-critical process was interrupted during an active window.
preventive_control: Non-persistent VDI needs separate compliance timing and grace-period validation.

title: Require secure boot compliance for privileged workstations
description: Required secure boot compliance for privileged access workstations. The policy targeted only the privileged workstation group and completed without production access loss.
lessons_learned: Narrow targeting and hardware readiness checks make secure boot enforcement predictable.

title: Password policy increase to 14 characters
description: Increased minimum password length to 14 characters for cloud-only accounts. Password reset flows and helpdesk scripts were updated before enforcement.
lessons_learned: Helpdesk scripts must be updated before password policy enforcement begins.

title: Block weak password patterns for service desk accounts
description: Enabled banned password patterns for service desk accounts. A temporary onboarding password pattern was still used by the identity automation workflow and new hires could not complete first sign-in.
lessons_learned: Password policy changes must be tested against identity automation and onboarding workflows.
trigger: Change 'Block weak password patterns for service desk accounts' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Automation identity failed authentication after the policy changed.
process_failure: Service account inventory was incomplete before enforcement.
business_impact: Automation stopped and delayed dependent business workflows.
preventive_control: Password policy changes must be tested against identity automation and onboarding workflows.

title: Password expiration removal for cloud users
description: Removed periodic password expiration for cloud-only users while keeping risk-based reset controls. User communications explained that MFA and risk detection remained mandatory.
lessons_learned: Explaining compensating controls prevents confusion when password expiration is removed.

title: Smart lockout threshold reduction
description: Reduced smart lockout threshold to slow password spray attempts. The threshold was too low for a legacy VPN auth bridge and caused repeated lockouts for remote support staff.
lessons_learned: Authentication bridges and VPN integrations need lockout simulation before threshold reductions.
trigger: Change 'Smart lockout threshold reduction' moved from planned state to enforcement.
technical_cause: Legacy protocol or client could not satisfy the new authentication requirement.
process_failure: Legacy application dependency was not identified before the change.
business_impact: Legacy application users or jobs could not complete work.
preventive_control: Authentication bridges and VPN integrations need lockout simulation before threshold reductions.

title: Password protection audit mode expansion
description: Expanded Entra password protection audit mode to all users and reviewed banned password hits with the identity team. No enforcement was enabled during this phase.
lessons_learned: Audit-only expansion provides realistic password policy telemetry without disrupting sign-ins.
